history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark, purple-themed game or profile interface shows a “LEVEL UP!” screen with level and experience statistics for a user named Kayzzz.

Main Subject:
The central focus is a rounded rectangular dashboard panel containing the title “LEVEL UP!” at the top and the user label “Kayzzz” with a small “#104” badge. A circular avatar on the left shows stylized text and graphics over a warm orange background with a magenta/purple ring around it. In the middle, two prominent boxes display “LEVEL 4” and “EXPERIENCE 4 / 250.” Below, a horizontal progress bar sits above a row of three smaller stat boxes: “MESSAGES 70,” “XP NEEDED 246,” and “NEXT LVL 5.” A line at the bottom of the panel reads “Congratulations on leveling up!”

Setting:
The image is an on-screen digital UI with no visible real-world setting. The background is a dark gradient with purple tones, and the interface panel is centered on the screen.

Visual Details:
The layout is symmetrical and centered, with rounded corners and glowing accents in purple, teal, and gold. The “LEVEL UP!” text at the top is in bright yellow/gold with small decorative diamond shapes on both sides. The “LEVEL 4” box has a dark purple background with bright white text, while the “EXPERIENCE” box uses a teal/green background with white text. The progress bar is a thick, dark track with a short highlighted segment to the left. The stat boxes beneath are dark and evenly spaced with bright label text.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Kayzzz
#104
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
4
EXPERIENCE
4 / 250
MESSAGES
70
XP NEEDED
246
NEXT LVL
5
1%
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image shows a “level up” dashboard displaying a user’s current level, experience progress, and related stats. It also includes a congratulatory message and a progress bar indicating advancement toward the next level.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
